questions.question: Which one is informal?
options: I am writing to inform you of a change in schedule.
The meeting has been rescheduled to Monday.
Can't make it, sorry, something came up.
Please let us know if further clarification is required.
questions.correctAnswer: Can't make it, sorry, something came up.

questions.question: The management has decided to ______ the proposal after careful review.
Within the firm's rigid ________, even minor decisions had to pass through several layers of approval.
